Appearances (by Zoom):
Dalal Kaddoura, Esq. 213-381-9988 WILSHIRE LAW FIRM, PLC for Plaintiff.
Jason Decker, Esq. 661-214-9905 Resnick & Louis P.C. for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Ms. Kaddoura submits to the TR, raises question on a secondary ex parte.
Mr. Decker contests and presents arguments; nature of dispute is declination of the continuance of the trial date, arguments may be moot, apologizes to the Court
Court comments; no authority over trial.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs Edas Isaula Gacia, Jeffrees Reyes Garcia and Elder Lainez Garcia's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)
